# agent-governance-vocabulary

> Canonical vocabulary for agent-governance terminology. Coordinates shared semantic ground across APS, SINT, AgentID, AgentGraph, MolTrust, ScopeBlind, and other governance-adjacent projects. Crosswalks under `crosswalk/` map one project's native terms into the vocabulary. Apache-2.0.

This is a neutral-ground repo. Multiple vendors contribute. The neutrality is the value. APS's crosswalk sits alongside SINT's, AgentID's, AgentGraph's, and others, with equal standing.

## Structure

- `vocab.yaml`: the single canonical term file
- `crosswalk/<project>.yaml`: per-project mappings into the vocabulary
- `fixtures/`: test vectors referencing term ids from `vocab.yaml`
- `docs/`: crosswalk format, rationale notes, contribution guides

## Canonical references

- [README.md](README.md): vocabulary overview
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): how to contribute a crosswalk
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): instructions for AI coding agents working on this repo, including the 5-check crosswalk PR protocol
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): pointer to AGENTS.md for Claude Code

## Related projects

- APS SDK: https://github.com/aeoess/agent-passport-system
- Website: https://aeoess.com

## Papers

Context papers from APS, which this vocabulary serves as one of several crosswalked protocols:

- The Agent Social Contract: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18749779
- Monotonic Narrowing: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18932404
- Faceted Authority Attenuation: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19260073
- Behavioral Derivation Rights: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19476002
- Physics-Enforced Delegation: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19478584
- Governance in the Medium: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19582550
- Cognitive Attestation: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19646276
- IETF Internet-Draft: draft-pidlisnyi-aps-00
